$comment: Example KautionsPfandNachweis QEAA credential — decoded SD-JWT claims for reference. Wire format is: header.payload.signature~disclosure_1~...~disclosure_n~

disclosures_decoded.$comment: Each disclosure is base64url(JSON array ['salt','claim_name',value]). The wallet selects which to include in a presentation.

human_readable_summary.de: Aareal Bank AG bestätigt: 3.000 € Mietkaution für Musterstraße 42, 10115 Berlin sind gemäß BGB § 551 rechtssicher verpfändet. Gültig bis 30.04.2027.
human_readable_summary.en: Aareal Bank AG confirms: EUR 3,000 rental deposit for Musterstraße 42, 10115 Berlin is legally pledged under BGB § 551. Valid until 30 Apr 2027.

presentation_example.$comment: When a landlord or verifier requests proof, the tenant's wallet presents a subset of disclosures. Here the tenant reveals deposit_amount and pledged_until but NOT their name.
